acceptanceContent: By accessing and using the LuxuryStay platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
bookingTermsContent: All bookings are subject to availability and confirmation. Prices may vary based on dates and availability.
cancellationContent: Free cancellation is available up to 48 hours before check-in. Late cancellations may incur charges.
privacyRef: For information about how we handle your data, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
contactUs: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at legal@luxurystay.com.
